changes.title: 新增
items: 新增 Rust 后端与 Vue 前端启动阶段追踪，主窗口会在首帧挂载后显示。
新增延后启动任务，用于标签预加载、最近工作区加载、Unity 监听、资产索引校准与知识索引。
Onboarding 支持内联配置自定义模型端点与 OpenAI Codex 设备授权。
Onboarding 支持测试自定义端点连接。
Knowledge 显示向量运行时启动状态，本地 embedding 启动时会展示轻量加载提示。

changes.title: 修复
items: Git 与 Python 运行时发现结果会缓存，Settings 可复用发现结果，减少重复阻塞扫描。
Git 运行时发现移到后台阻塞任务中执行。
Onboarding 打开项目时会显示处理中状态，并在切换完成前禁用导航。
Knowledge 列表与概览读取在 embedding manager 繁忙时保持响应。

changes.title: 移除
items: 暂无条目。

changes.title: Added
items: Added startup tracing across the Rust backend and Vue frontend, with the main window shown after the first mounted frame.
Added deferred startup work for tab preloading, recent workspace loading, Unity monitoring, asset reconciliation, and knowledge indexing.
Added inline model setup in onboarding for custom endpoints and OpenAI Codex device auth.
Added connection testing for custom endpoints during onboarding.
Added visible vector runtime startup state in Knowledge, including a compact loading indicator while local embeddings start.

changes.title: Fixed
items: Cached Git and Python runtime discovery so Settings can reuse discovered runtimes without repeating blocking scans.
Moved Git runtime discovery off the blocking command path.
Added onboarding project-opening feedback and disabled navigation while the selected project is being opened.
Kept Knowledge list and overview reads responsive while the embedding manager is busy.

changes.title: Removed
items: No changes.
